messages.subject: [R-sig-ins] EEV
messages.body_plain:
Hello,

I?m looking for R function to computeEuropean Embedded Value  <https://www.soa.org/library/journals/actuarial-practice-forum/2006/october/APF0610_2.pdf>  (EEV).
I've searched but cannot find an R package that covers this topic.
Before I create it myself, does anyone know of an R resource for computing EEV?

Thank you in advance.

Sherry LaMonica


	[[alternative HTML version deleted]]
